---
title: "Untitled"
author: '2'
date: "2026-05-08"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# Código R: Modelos logísticos NSUM + métricas + exportación a Excel

# =========================================================
# LIBRERÍAS
# =========================================================

library(dplyr)
library(caret)
library(pROC)
library(openxlsx)

# =========================================================
# COPIA DE BASE
# =========================================================

bbdd <- cuidansum_data_netq_anonymized_filtered

# =========================================================
# ASEGURAR FACTORES
# =========================================================

bbdd$Gender <- as.factor(bbdd$Gender)

# =========================================================
# VARIABLES BINARIAS DIRECTAS
# =========================================================

# Q45
bbdd$Q45_bin <- ifelse(
  bbdd$Q45 %in% c(
    "Sí, he usado la reducción de jornada y la excedencia (en el pasado o actualmente)",
    "Sí, he usado la reducción de jornada (en el pasado o actualmente)",
    "Sí, he usado la excedencia (en el pasado o actualmente)",
    "Sí, he trabajado a tiempo parcial para facilitar la conciliación (en el pasado o actualmente)"
  ),
  1,
  0
)

# Q47
bbdd$Q47_bin= bbdd$Q47_si.conciliar


# Q48
bbdd$Q48_bin <- ifelse(
  bbdd$Q48 == "Nunca",
  0,
  1
)

# Q52
bbdd$Q52_bin <- ifelse(
  bbdd$Q52 == "No",
  0,
  1
)

# Q53
bbdd$Q53_bin <- ifelse(
  bbdd$Q53 == "No",
  0,
  1
)

# Q54
bbdd$Q54_bin <- ifelse(
  bbdd$Q54 == "Equitativo",
  1,
  0
)

# Q59
bbdd$Q59_bin <- ifelse(
  bbdd$Q59 == "Habitualmente, es un motivo de conflicto frecuente en casa",
  1,
  0
)

# Q61
bbdd$Q61_bin <- ifelse(
  bbdd$Q61 == "La mujer debería encargarse de la mayoría de las tareas",
  1,
  0
)

# =========================================================
# LISTA DE MODELOS
# =========================================================

modelos <- list(
  list(nombre = "Q17_Q45_Femeninoes",
       data = bbdd %>% filter(Gender == "Femenino") %>% select(Q17, Q45_bin) %>% na.omit(),
       y = "Q45_bin",
       x = "Q17"),
  
  list(nombre = "Q18_Q45_Masculinos",
       data = bbdd %>% filter(Gender == "Masculino") %>% select(Q18, Q45_bin) %>% na.omit(),
       y = "Q45_bin",
       x = "Q18"),
  
  list(nombre = "Q19_Q47_Femeninoes",
       data = bbdd %>% filter(Gender == "Femenino") %>% select(Q19, Q47_bin) %>% na.omit(),
       y = "Q47_bin",
       x = "Q19"),
  
  list(nombre = "Q20_Q47_Masculinos",
       data = bbdd %>% filter(Gender == "Masculino") %>% select(Q20, Q47_bin) %>% na.omit(),
       y = "Q47_bin",
       x = "Q20"),
  
  list(nombre = "Q21_Q48_Femeninoes",
       data = bbdd %>% filter(Gender == "Femenino") %>% select(Q21, Q48_bin) %>% na.omit(),
       y = "Q48_bin",
       x = "Q21"),
  
  list(nombre = "Q22_Q48_Masculinos",
       data = bbdd %>% filter(Gender == "Masculino") %>% select(Q22, Q48_bin) %>% na.omit(),
       y = "Q48_bin",
       x = "Q22"),
  
  list(nombre = "Q24_Q52",
       data = bbdd %>% select(Q24, Q52_bin) %>% na.omit(),
       y = "Q52_bin",
       x = "Q24"),
  
  list(nombre = "Q25_Q53",
       data = bbdd %>% select(Q25, Q53_bin) %>% na.omit(),
       y = "Q53_bin",
       x = "Q25"),
  
  list(nombre = "Q27_Q54",
       data = bbdd %>% select(Q27, Q54_bin) %>% na.omit(),
       y = "Q54_bin",
       x = "Q27"),
  
  list(nombre = "Q28_Q54",
       data = bbdd %>% select(Q28, Q54_bin) %>% na.omit(),
       y = "Q54_bin",
       x = "Q28"),
  
  list(nombre = "Q29_Q59",
       data = bbdd %>% select(Q29, Q59_bin) %>% na.omit(),
       y = "Q59_bin",
       x = "Q29"),
  
  list(nombre = "Q33_Q61_Femeninoes",
       data = bbdd %>% filter(Gender == "Femenino") %>% select(Q33, Q61_bin) %>% na.omit(),
       y = "Q61_bin",
       x = "Q33"),
  
  list(nombre = "Q34_Q61_Masculinos",
       data = bbdd %>% filter(Gender == "Masculino") %>% select(Q34, Q61_bin) %>% na.omit(),
       y = "Q61_bin",
       x = "Q34")
)

# =========================================================
# DATAFRAMES RESULTADOS
# =========================================================

coeficientes_df <- data.frame()
metricas_df <- data.frame()
confusion_df <- data.frame()

# =========================================================
# LOOP MODELOS
# =========================================================

for(i in 1:length(modelos)){
  
  modelo_info <- modelos[[i]]
  
  formula_modelo <- as.formula(
    paste(modelo_info$y, "~", modelo_info$x)
  )
  
# =====================================================
# COMPROBAR CLASES
# =====================================================

real_values <- modelo_info$data[[modelo_info$y]]

if(length(unique(real_values)) < 2){

  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("MODELO OMITIDO:", modelo_info$nombre, "\n")
  cat("Solo existe una clase en la variable respuesta\n")
  cat("====================================\n")

  next
}

# =====================================================
# MODELO
# =====================================================

modelo <- glm(
  formula_modelo,
  data = modelo_info$data,
  family = binomial
)

# =====================================================
# PREDICCIONES
# =====================================================

probs <- predict(modelo, type = "response")
  
  modelo <- glm(
    formula_modelo,
    data = modelo_info$data,
    family = binomial
  )
  
  # =====================================================
  # COEFICIENTES
  # =====================================================
  
  coef_modelo <- summary(modelo)$coefficients
  
  coef_df_temp <- data.frame(
    Modelo = modelo_info$nombre,
    Variable = rownames(coef_modelo),
    Estimate = coef_modelo[,1],
    Std_Error = coef_modelo[,2],
    z_value = coef_modelo[,3],
    p_value = coef_modelo[,4]
  )
  
  coeficientes_df <- rbind(coeficientes_df, coef_df_temp)
  
  # =====================================================
  # PREDICCIONES
  # =====================================================
  
  probs <- predict(modelo, type = "response")
  
  pred <- ifelse(probs > 0.5, 1, 0)
  
  pred <- factor(pred, levels = c(0,1))
  real <- factor(modelo_info$data[[modelo_info$y]], levels = c(0,1))
  
  # =====================================================
  # MATRIZ CONFUSIÓN
  # =====================================================
  
  conf <- confusionMatrix(pred, real, positive = "1")
  
  conf_table <- as.data.frame(conf$table)
  conf_table$Modelo <- modelo_info$nombre
  
  confusion_df <- rbind(confusion_df, conf_table)
  
  # =====================================================
  # ROC + AUC
  # =====================================================
  
  if(length(unique(real)) < 2){

  auc_val <- NA

} else {

  roc_obj <- roc(real, probs)
  auc_val <- as.numeric(auc(roc_obj))
}
  auc_val <- as.numeric(auc(roc_obj))
  
  # =====================================================
  # MÉTRICAS
  # =====================================================
  
  metricas_temp <- data.frame(
    Modelo = modelo_info$nombre,
    Accuracy = conf$overall["Accuracy"],
    Balanced_Accuracy = conf$byClass["Balanced Accuracy"],
    Sensitivity = conf$byClass["Sensitivity"],
    Specificity = conf$byClass["Specificity"],
    F1 = conf$byClass["F1"],
    Kappa = conf$overall["Kappa"],
    AUC = auc_val,
    AIC = AIC(modelo)
  )
  
  metricas_df <- rbind(metricas_df, metricas_temp)
  
  # =====================================================
  # IMPRIMIR RESULTADOS
  # =====================================================
  
  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("MODELO:", modelo_info$nombre, "\n")
  cat("====================================\n")
  
  print(summary(modelo))
  
  cat("\nMATRIZ DE CONFUSIÓN\n")
  print(conf$table)
  
  cat("\nAUC:\n")
  print(auc_val)
  
  cat("\nBALANCED ACCURACY:\n")
  print(conf$byClass["Balanced Accuracy"])
}

# =========================================================
# EXPORTAR A EXCEL
# =========================================================

wb <- createWorkbook()

addWorksheet(wb, "Coeficientes")
writeData(wb, "Coeficientes", coeficientes_df)

addWorksheet(wb, "Metricas")
writeData(wb, "Metricas", metricas_df)

addWorksheet(wb, "Matrices_Confusion")
writeData(wb, "Matrices_Confusion", confusion_df)

saveWorkbook(
  wb,
  file = "resultados_modelos_logisticos.xlsx",
  overwrite = TRUE
)

# =========================================================
# RESULTADOS FINALES
# =========================================================

coeficientes_df
metricas_df
confusion_df

```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# LIBRERÍAS
# =========================================================

library(ggplot2)

# =========================================================
# BOXPLOTS USANDO LA LISTA 'modelos'
# =========================================================

for(i in 1:length(modelos)){

  modelo_info <- modelos[[i]]

  datos <- modelo_info$data
  xvar <- modelo_info$x
  yvar <- modelo_info$y

  # pasar respuesta a factor
  datos[[yvar]] <- as.factor(datos[[yvar]])

  # =====================================================
  # BOXPLOT
  # =====================================================

p <- ggplot(
  datos,
  aes_string(
    x = yvar,
    y = xvar,
    fill = yvar
  )
) +

  # =====================================================
  # BOXPLOT
  # =====================================================

  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.55,
    alpha = 0.9,
    linewidth = 0.7,
    outlier.shape = 21,
    outlier.size = 2.5,
    outlier.stroke = 0.3,
    color = "gray25"
  ) +

  # =====================================================
  # MEDIA
  # =====================================================

  stat_summary(
    fun = mean,
    geom = "point",
    shape = 18,
    size = 3,
    color = "#08306B"
  ) +

  # =====================================================
  # COLORES PROFESIONALES
  # =====================================================

  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "#BDD7E7",
      "#3182BD"
    )
  ) +

  # =====================================================
  # ETIQUETAS ELEGANTES
  # =====================================================

  scale_x_discrete(
    labels = c(
      "0" = "No",
      "1" = "Sí"
    )
  ) +

  # =====================================================
  # TÍTULOS
  # =====================================================

  labs(
    title = paste("Distribución de", xvar),
    subtitle = paste(
      "Comparación según la respuesta directa:",
      yvar
    ),
    x = "Respuesta directa",
    y = "Número de contactos reportados"
  ) +

  # =====================================================
  # TEMA TFG
  # =====================================================

  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +

  theme(

    # títulos
    plot.title = element_text(
      face = "bold",
      size = 17,
      hjust = 0.5,
      margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 8)
    ),

    plot.subtitle = element_text(
      size = 11,
      color = "gray35",
      hjust = 0.5,
      margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 15)
    ),

    # ejes
    axis.title = element_text(
      face = "bold",
      size = 13
    ),

    axis.text = element_text(
      size = 11,
      color = "gray20"
    ),

    # fondo limpio
    panel.border = element_blank(),

    # grid horizontal suave
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(
      color = "gray90",
      linewidth = 0.3
    ),

    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),

    # quitar leyenda
    legend.position = "none",

    # márgenes
    plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(
      15, 15, 15, 15
    )
  )

print(p)

  # =====================================================
  # GUARDAR
  # =====================================================
dir.create("figuras", showWarnings = FALSE)
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(
    "figuras",
    paste0(modelo_info$nombre, ".pdf")
  ),
  plot = p,
  width = 7,
  height = 5
)
}
```
```{r}
files <- list.files("figuras", pattern = "*.pdf")

latex_code <- sapply(files, function(f){

  paste0(
"\\begin{figure}[H]
\\centering
\\includegraphics[width=0.75\\linewidth]{figuras/", f, "}
\\caption{", gsub(".pdf","",f), "}
\\end{figure}\n"
  )

})

cat(latex_code, file = "figuras.tex")
```
